author: y4rr
content:
Failure-mode #11 (stale source document) accreted hits — Pass 4 audit's MPS framing was severely overstated. Of the audit's '8 STUB cluster' (#1100), only 3 sites were real bugs; the other 5 are DEFERRED-WIRED-STUB:

- ferrotorch-mps/src/backend.rs:494-497 (neg_f32) — already returns Err with follow-up #626
- ferrotorch-mps/src/backend.rs:791-794 (gelu_f32) — already returns Err with follow-up #626
- ferrotorch-mps/src/backend.rs:797-806 (dropout_f32) — already returns Err with follow-up #626
- ferrotorch-mps/src/lib.rs:201-210 (init_mps_backend non-macOS branch) — by-design correct
- ~70 GpuBackend trait methods inheriting default-method Errs — never silent stubs

Tally update: Pass 5.A.1 caught 1 stale audit finding (registry-asymmetry). Pass 5.A.2 caught 5. Pattern prediction for upcoming dispatches: assume ~30-50% of Pass 4 STUB findings are stale. Pre-flight source-document reassessment is mandatory and high-value.
